programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke have to protect a rock n roll star whose life is threatened

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Photographer with an attitude is assigned to the 73 Crew McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to get rid of her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Ashamed of his desk job Binghamton assumes command of the 73 during McHales absence and takes it out on a combat mission so that he can have a war story to share with his battle-hardened fellow Officers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter receives anonymous love letters

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Granpda urges Pepino to marry his new girlfriend Rosita when he notices improvements in his work ethic but the McCoys must first help him obtain a dowry by making a favorable impression on the girls demanding Uncle Lopez

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa is stubbornly opposed to Hassies friendship with hot rod enthusiast Eddie Collins and must be convinced that the young man is a serious engineering student and mechanic rather than a hooligan

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and suffers amnesia As he struggles to remember who he is and why two men are attempting to kill him he falls in love with Gypsy and works the bumper car pavilion of her uncles carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink helps an old friend by assisting Hogan in the theft of the plans for an assassination on the Fuehrer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Three American women show up at Stalag 13 and Hogan wants to know why

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 210
programme.desc: Hercules 210

programme.title: Earth Final Conflct
programme.desc: Lili wakes up supposedly on Earth after a coma and is told the Jaridians have come and conquered the Taelons She remembers Sandoval telling her she no longer has and Earth-based physiology and believes things are not as they seem

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The alien embryo created on the Breeding Groundepisode has now grown and is now a pre-adolescent in human terms named Adam residing in a special school occupied by human children with exceptional IQs secretly run by the Morthren The aliens have nefarious plans for the children

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter Delmer Plebus Powells Gwent a huge spacecraft which defies aerodynamics and is an extension of Gwents genius and ego

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

programme.desc: Sean McKinnon v. Rhys Jones Jessica “Thumper” Gladstone v. Lindsay Ball Chris McMillan v. Mike Stripling Nate Smandych v. Sean Kearney Luke Theriault v. Mike Wright Jake Peacock v. Chris Rockwell Kelsey Andries v. Jamie Droeske Zach Darling v. Jason Diep

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Sambath Khun at HK49

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every sport has it's unique set of injuries - however, fighters deal with injury more often than the average athlete. After every fight a fighter must push themselves to get healthy to be ready to fight again. After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Adam Price

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A radioactive meteor crashes on Earth and VENOM steals it by disguising Switchblade as a UFO

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the Book of Power which is the key to the Lost City of Mong Paco and its giant jewel-covered idol

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village
